# Rupeewa News Daily

> Stay ahead with the latest tech news, AI breakthroughs, startup stories, and gadget reviews. Curated daily from 6 top sources including Hacker News, TechCrunch, The Verge, Ars Technica, Wired, and DEV Community.

## Tech News Categories

- [Today's Top Tech News](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/): Current tech headlines from 6 sources, updated daily at 7 AM.
- [Hacker News](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=hackernews): Popular tech stories from Y Combinator's community.
- [TechCrunch](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=techcrunch): Startup news, funding rounds, and tech industry analysis.
- [The Verge](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=theverge): Consumer tech, reviews, and gadget news.
- [Wired](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=wired): Technology, science, culture, and politics coverage.
- [Ars Technica](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=arstechnica): In-depth tech news, science, and IT analysis.
- [DEV Community](https://rupeewa.vercel.app/?source=devcommunity): Developer-focused articles, tutorials, and programming insights.

## About

Rupeewa News Daily is a curated tech news aggregator that brings together the best technology journalism from across the web. Updated daily with fresh stories from authoritative sources.
